metadata.title: Whisper-Up
metadata.description: Career tarot meets data — find your move with confidence.

nav.tag: Thinking about switching jobs? Read the tarot first.

hero.subLine2: then confirm with data how much your salary could rise.
hero.freePaid: Your salary uplift + matching companies for just 29,000 VND.
hero.ctaNote: Pick your cards · See results instantly · No name or email needed

01.label: STEP 01
01.title: Free Tarot
01.desc: Pick a topic, draw 3 cards. Get your direction and intuition first. Completely free.

02.label: STEP 02
02.title: Data Confidence
02.desc: After your reading — if you want the real number, it's 29,000 VND. See exactly how much your salary could jump.

03.label: STEP 03
03.title: Job Matches
03.desc: Want to know which companies fit you best? Add more info and get personalized job recommendations.

social.weeklyCount: <n>{count}</n> people had their cards read this week

items.quote: First time trying tarot — the cards nailed my burnout. The +24% number matched the offer I just got. Already scheduled the interview 😂
items.name: T**

items.quote: Engineering 5–8 yrs Hanoi → +28%. Wish I'd done this 2 years ago. Stayed too long out of fear.
items.name: J**

items.quote: It's fun but oddly accurate. The cards picked 'different environment' which is exactly what I'd been thinking. Worth 29,000 VND.
items.name: M**

items.quote: Girlfriend told me to try. Tarot is tarot, but the number gives me confidence to go talk to my boss.
items.name: D**

items.q: How is this different from regular tarot?
items.a: Traditional tarot plus real data. The cards point a direction (timing · potential · path); the data gives a concrete salary upside number.

items.q: Where does the salary data come from?
items.a: Real Vietnam job-switchers from the last 24 months, broken down by role, experience, and city. If the sample is too small, no result is shown.
Tarot is tarot — for fun and reference. The salary data is real. But big decisions are still yours — not the 3 cards. Don't quit your job just for +28%.
Generally no — it's a digital result you've already seen. But if a payment error or technical glitch meant you couldn't view your result, email us and we'll sort it out.

disclaimer.title: ⚠ FOR ENTERTAINMENT
disclaimer.body: This is tarot. Treat it as a fun reference, not a career counselor. We're not liable if you switch jobs based on 3 cards and miss the old team's free coffee. ☕✦

topic.label: ✦ CAREER TAROT ✦
topic.question: What's on your mind right now?

options.timing:
Is now the right time
to switch jobs?
options.potential:
Will things actually
get better if I switch?

deck.label: ✦ Choose Your Cards ✦
deck.instruction: Hold your question in mind — then pick the cards you feel drawn to

result.label: ✦ The Cards Speak ✦

synthesis.timing: What the three cards show together — the grain of this current. How you spend the timing the cards point to is, in the end, your choice.
synthesis.potential: What the cards illuminate together — potential that's been sleeping inside you. Next, the data will add concrete numbers to that potential.
synthesis.direction: The shape the three cards draw together — the contour of an environment that fits you. Where to find that shape is the next question.

result.softCtaNote: Free — share role, experience, city, salary

interpretations.situation: Something familiar is already shaking. What looks stable is actually collapsing underneath.
interpretations.energy: An external shock is at work — break it or be broken, change is coming either way.
interpretations.outcome: After the old structure cracks, a far sturdier path reveals itself. The collapse is a clearing, not an ending.

interpretations.situation: You're in the middle of a current that's turning. Yesterday's luck and today's luck are no longer the same.
interpretations.energy: A fated timing is at work. Reading the current beats forcing it.
interpretations.outcome: A new cycle begins. What's been blocked for a long time unlocks faster than expected.

interpretations.situation: The tail end of a dark stretch — a small light is already in.
interpretations.energy: Energy of recovery and inspiration. Strongest when faith doesn't waver.
interpretations.outcome: Possibilities that seemed distant actually land in your hands. A peaceful arrival.

interpretations.situation: A chapter is nearly closed. There's almost nothing left to learn in your current spot.
interpretations.energy: Energy of integration and tying off — the things you've postponed need closing before the next stage opens.
interpretations.outcome: Completion of one cycle alongside entry into a bigger stage. Ending and beginning at once.

interpretations.situation: Deep down, an urge to start over is alive. Even if it has no shape yet.
interpretations.energy: Energy of lightness and adventure. The first step beats a perfect plan.
interpretations.outcome: A choice that looks reckless works out better than expected. A new road comes to meet you.

hermit.name: The Hermit
hermit.meaning: The answer is already within you

interpretations.situation: You're searching outside for the answer — but it's already stirring within.
interpretations.energy: A time of stillness and self-inquiry. Your own lamp burns brighter than anyone's advice.
interpretations.outcome: A deep clarity arrives. The standard for your decisions becomes entirely your own.

interpretations.situation: The fog is lifting. Your view is clearer than it's been in a long time.
interpretations.energy: The light of vitality and confidence. The more you let yourself be seen, the more is drawn to you.
interpretations.outcome: A clear success. Your effort shows in the sunlight and is rewarded plainly.

interpretations.situation: Beneath the surface, anxiety and intuition ripple at the same time. What's real is hard to tell.
interpretations.energy: The illusion of fear is at work. Telling fear apart from intuition is this period's central task.
interpretations.outcome: As the fog clears, the hidden truth shows itself — comfortable or not.

interpretations.situation: Structure and responsibility are already in place. Stable, but possibly stifling.
interpretations.energy: Energy of authority and systems. A time to move by strategy and structure, not by feeling.
interpretations.outcome: Steadiness is rewarded with a solid seat. A firm climb rather than a fast jump.

interpretations.situation: Momentum is gathering — set the direction and you can leave at once.
interpretations.energy: The power of decision and focus. A time to fold many directions into one.
interpretations.outcome: A frontal win. What you've been hesitating on breaks open faster than expected.

interpretations.situation: A testing period — you tremble, but the strength to endure is already there.
interpretations.energy: Energy of gentle strength. Don't force it down — tame it.
interpretations.outcome: A true overcoming. The result is past your own limit, not anyone else's measure.

interpretations.situation: Beneath the surface, you already know something that hasn't been spoken.
interpretations.energy: Energy of intuition and secrets. Sensing — not logic — holds the answer.
interpretations.outcome: Hidden information, opportunities, and truths come into view. The intuition is proven right.

paidResult.companiesNote: Phase 1 sample. Real partner listings coming next.
paidResult.guideText: Your current {currentSalary}M VND → realistic target {targetSalary}M VND ({pct}% above current). You're in a strong position to ask above the market average — open with the upper end of the range and let them counter.
paidResult.interpretationText: The cards spoke of {cardSummary}. The data confirms that direction — a +{pct}% upside at the top {percentile}% of your profile. The path the cards pointed to is materially supported.
paidResult.basisText: Calculated from real Vietnam job-switcher data. Role · experience · city · salary all factored in.
